home.title: Bingo
home.subtitle: Create or join a room to play

help.intro: Host a bingo game for your group. Create a room to draw numbers and share with players, or join an existing room with a code from your host.
help.createHint: You'll be the host — pick or draw numbers and share the room code with your players.
help.joinHint: Enter the 6-character code your host shared with you.

createRoom.title: Create Room
createRoom.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or less
createRoom.nameConflict: A room with that name already exists

help.createIntro: Set up your bingo room. After creating, you'll get a room code and QR code to share with your players.
help.drawModeExplained: Manual mode is for when you have a bingo globe and want to pick the numbers yourself. Automatic mode lets the system draw random numbers for you.

help.joinIntro: Ask your host for the 6-character room code. You can also scan the QR code if they have one displayed.

help.playerIntro: The host is drawing numbers. When a number is called, it will appear here. Mark it off on your bingo card!
help.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to start drawing numbers. Keep this page open — updates appear in real time.

admin.title: Creator Panel
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this room?
admin.scanToJoin: Scan this code to join the room

help.adminIntro: You're the host. Numbers you draw are shown live to all players in this room.
help.manualMode: Click on a number to draw it. Already drawn numbers are disabled.
help.automaticMode: Click the button to draw a random number.
help.correction: Drew the wrong number? Use the Correct button to fix it.
help.shareRoom: Share the room code or QR code with your players so they can follow along.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
